main.description: Initiate account deletion. Returns the deletion method(s) available for this account: 'wid' for WID-only accounts (no real email), 'email' for email+password accounts, or 'wid+email' for accounts with both. When the method includes 'wid', a QuickLogin QR session is started and the session fields are returned. When the method includes 'email', a deletion token is sent to the account's email address. Requires a full-access session token (not OAuth).

method.description: Which deletion flow(s) are available. 'wid' = WID QR scan only (no real email on account). 'email' = email token only (no WID). 'wid+email' = both flows are available; a QR session has been started and an email token has been sent.

sessionId.description: Present when method is 'wid' or 'wid+email'. The QuickLogin session ID for polling status.

sessionToken.description: Present when method is 'wid' or 'wid+email'. Opaque session token for authenticating polling requests.

qrCodeUrl.description: Present when method is 'wid' or 'wid+email'. Base64 image data URL of the QR code to display.

expiresAt.description: Present when method is 'wid' or 'wid+email'. ISO timestamp after which the QR session expires.

errors.name: NoDeleteMethod
errors.description: Account has neither a WID association nor a verified email address and cannot be deleted through this endpoint.
